title: Events Archives
text:
Webinar: Cold Mix Asphalt Binder System
Deadline— March 2, 2026
ERDC's patented technology that addresses challenges in asphalt repair and maintenance has strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of this technology can be beneficial for business growth and development.
Read MoreWebinar: Cold Mix Asphalt Binder System
Supporting Objective Determinations of Areas That Are Not “Waters of the United States” (Non-WOTUS) Post-Sackett Using Geospatial Tools” Workshop
Deadline— February 20, 2026
This is an invitation-only event. ERDC is hosting a Non-WOTUS Decision-Support Tool Workshop in support of the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers.
Read MoreSupporting Objective Determinations of Areas That Are Not “Waters of the United States” (Non-WOTUS) Post-Sackett Using Geospatial Tools” Workshop
Innovation 2 Market
Deadline— August 8, 2025 (Closed)
The Innovation 2 Market (I2M) Patent Showcase in Champaign, IL, will help businesses and investors pursue opportunities to introduce ERDC innovations to government and commercial markets.
Read MoreInnovation 2 Market

Deadline— July 14, 2025 (Closed)
ERDC's patented technologies that address challenges in waterways engineering have strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.

U.S. Army ERDC River City Communications Summit
Deadline— May 19, 2025 (Closed)
ERDC's River City Communications Summit will bring together the best-of-the-best in the communications community to learn more effective communication strategies and tactics.
Read MoreU.S. Army ERDC River City Communications Summit

Elevating Small Business Partnerships
Deadline— April 21, 2025 (Closed)
ERDC, in coordination with ERDCWERX, is hosting a hybrid small business workshop that will feature informational briefings to assist small businesses when pursuing government contract opportunities.

Crisis Preparedness Science & Technology Workshop
Deadline— August 21, 2024 (Closed)
INVITATION-ONLY EVENT: This workshop aims to enhance collaboration among agencies by characterizing S&T needs, communicating priorities, and sharing information on science and technology efforts supporting preparedness, response, recovery, and mitigation.
